creator: segin2005@gmail.com
text:
deskpaint 3.1 exists, but ports only installs 3.

REQUEST TO MAINTAINER: When I originally submitted this port (v3), it was suggested that 'deskutils' be a better category. I agreed, but no one ever moved it. If possible, please move this port from x11 to deskutils. 

ALSO: Apologies to 'misc' category team; I accidently submitted this PR under 'misc' and not 'ports' the first time, please inform them to summarily disregard. Thanks.

Fix: Apply .diff, install x11/deskpaint, enjoy having a newer version than ports currently installs.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: install 'x11/deskpaint' through whatever mechanism suits your fancy. I personally 'cd /usr/ports/x11/deskpaint && make install'
